# nebula-chart-dev

Install this skill into your own agent environment with the `skills` CLI.

From GitHub:

```bash
npx skills add https://github.com/qlik-oss/nebula.js --skill nebula-chart-dev
```

If you want it installed globally for your user profile:

```bash
npx skills add https://github.com/qlik-oss/nebula.js --skill nebula-chart-dev -g
```

From a local checkout of this repository:

```bash
npx skills add . --skill nebula-chart-dev
```

If you want to target GitHub Copilot explicitly:

```bash
npx skills add https://github.com/qlik-oss/nebula.js --skill nebula-chart-dev -a github-copilot
```
